task_completion.description: Verify that the three DSN ground stations (Goldstone, Madrid, Canberra) have been created or configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit Ground Stations' dialog showing Goldstone, Madrid, and Canberra in the list, or check that these names appear as the observer/location in the module headers.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the DSN_Goldstone tracking module assigned to the Goldstone ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module window or tab explicitly named 'DSN_Goldstone'. The observer location for this module should be set to Goldstone.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the DSN_Madrid tracking module assigned to the Madrid ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module window or tab explicitly named 'DSN_Madrid'. The observer location for this module should be set to Madrid.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the DSN_Canberra tracking module assigned to the Canberra ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a module window or tab explicitly named 'DSN_Canberra'. The observer location for this module should be set to Canberra.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct four satellites are being tracked in the modules.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the satellite lists within the DSN modules. Each module should display ISS (ZARYA), CSS (TIANHE), NOAA 19, and AO-7.

task_completion.description: Verify that GPredict is configured to display UTC time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main clock in the GPredict interface or the time displayed in the module headers. It should explicitly show 'UTC' rather than a local time zone.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the GPredict graphical interface to display the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The GPredict application window should be open and visible, showing the configured modules, rather than just a terminal window showing configuration file edits.

integrity.description: Verify that the tracking modules are genuine GPredict UI elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: The modules should appear as standard GPredict tabs or detached windows containing lists, radar views, or maps, not as text files or mocked-up images.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent didn't just type the expected answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen should not just show a text editor (like nano or gedit) with the names of the ground stations and satellites typed out.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires configuring three specific ground stations: Goldstone (35.4267 N, 116.8900 W, 1031m), Madrid (40.4314 N, 3.9527 W, 830m), and Canberra (35.4014 S, 148.9817 E, 680m). Three modules named exactly 'DSN_Goldstone', 'DSN_Madrid', and 'DSN_Canberra' must be created. Each module must track exactly four satellites: ISS (NORAD 25544), CSS TIANHE (NORAD 48274), NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591), and AO-7 (NORAD 7530). The application must be set to display UTC time.
